verse_text: The name of Amram's wife was Jochebed the daughter of Levi, who was born to Levi in Egypt; and to Amram she bore Aaron and Moses and their sister Miriam.

links.context: Moses' parents were Amram and Jochebed (6:20; [[NUM.26:59]]). They hid Moses for three months because they embraced the faith of Abraham ([[HEB.11:8]]-15; 23). Thus, they were not afraid of the king's commandment.
